title: ITALY enforcement action against Barber Shop (800)
summary: Insufficient fulfilment of information obligations The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 800 on a barber shop. The controller had been using a video surveillance system and failed to install the necessary information signs. Legal basis: Art. 5 (1) a) GDPR, Art. 13 GDPR.
dedupKey: italy enforcement action against barber shop 800|2026-03-12
